positive: A detailed, stylized cosmic landscape featuring abstract nebula swirls and interconnected geometric mandalas. Central focus on a glowing, ethereal celestial body surrounded by intricate, branching bioluminescent flora. Use a vibrant, high-contrast palette of deep indigo, electric cyan, magenta, and metallic gold accents. The style must be a fusion of Neo-Art Nouveau line work and clean, modern vector graphic design. The composition must be perfectly symmetrical, suitable for apparel printing, with clean silhouettes and strong, legible contrast. Highly intricate, symmetrical, seamless pattern quality.
negative: blur, artifacts, text, watermark, extra limbs, bad anatomy, noise, low detail, blurry, grainy, signature, handwriting, jpeg artifacts, writing
